scope: viewspec repository history through pull request 135

bugs.name: Responsive and inspector overflow
bugs.invariant: Every public page must remain within the document viewport at 390px and 1440px widths.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded

bugs.name: Malformed landing IntentBundle payload
bugs.invariant: Every selectable landing payload combination must satisfy the canonical substrate, address, group, and motif shapes.

guards.anchor: Validated ${cartesian(HINT_OPTIONS).length} landing payload combinations.

bugs.name: Playground authentication and boot failure
bugs.invariant: The public landing must boot without browser runtime errors and its live API configuration must remain explicit and valid.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded
assert.equal(Object.hasOwn(placeholderKey.compileRequestHeaders(), 'Authorization'), false)

bugs.name: Hosted response shape mismatch
bugs.invariant: Browser surfaces must reject runtime shape failures and the SDK must normalize hosted responses through one contract.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded
Compiler response payload must be an object

bugs.name: Hard-coded compile timing claims
bugs.invariant: The site must render without stale timing-dependent failures and public commercial facts must come from checked source data.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded
assert.doesNotMatch(page, /P(?:50|95|99) compile
Number.isFinite(result.data.meta.round_trip_ms)

bugs.name: Endpoint, quota, and failover drift
bugs.invariant: Endpoint candidates must be unique, bounded by pinned stagger and failure-TTL values, and remain browser-loadable.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded
assert.equal(LANDING_CONFIG.endpointFailureTtlMs, 300000)
assert.deepEqual(stored.failures, {})

bugs.name: Clipboard false-success and rejection
bugs.invariant: Every public copy control must fall back after Clipboard API rejection and expose success or failure without an unhandled promise.

guards.anchor: copy controls fall back when the Clipboard API rejects
checkout key copy falls back without leaking a runtime rejection

bugs.name: DESIGN.md duplicate-key and ingestion ambiguity
bugs.invariant: DESIGN.md parsing must reject duplicate keys at every nesting level instead of accepting last-write-wins data.

bugs.name: Generated landing JavaScript syntax errors
bugs.invariant: Every public demo must execute in Chromium without pageerror or console error events.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded

bugs.name: Stale transitive browser module graph
bugs.invariant: Every same-origin module requested by a public demo must return below HTTP 400 during a real browser load.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded

bugs.name: Proof demo sandbox, cropping, and static rendering
bugs.invariant: Proof surfaces must load as visible main content at both bounded browser viewports without overflow or runtime failure.

guards.anchor: proof bundle exposes complete bounded proof content
provenance inspector locks a verified semantic chain

bugs.name: Hover flicker and unstable interaction state
bugs.invariant: Public demo interaction code must execute without runtime errors across desktop and mobile browser layouts.

guards.anchor: provenance hover remains populated across sibling transitions

bugs.name: Invalid tab semantics
bugs.invariant: Every role=tab must belong to a tablist, carry boolean aria-selected, and control an existing tabpanel.

guards.anchor: invalid tab semantics

bugs.name: Stranded UI fixes and stale landing CI
bugs.invariant: Committed public demos must stay runnable in the browser and generated demos must stay byte-equivalent to their builders.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded

bugs.name: Package and runtime version mismatch
bugs.invariant: Project metadata, built archive metadata, filenames, and viewspec._version must carry one identical version.

bugs.name: Compiler and remote-client raw failure leakage
bugs.invariant: Remote failures must preserve bounded structured code, message, status, checklist, and correction metadata across generated responses.

bugs.name: React runtime data crashes
bugs.invariant: A generated React artifact must build, mount, render data, dispatch an action, and produce no browser runtime errors in a host app.

guards.anchor: generated React Tailwind artifact builds and behaves in a host app

bugs.name: React checker rejected actionless artifacts
bugs.invariant: Every starter kind must compile and check successfully for both HTML and React, including artifacts with zero actions.

bugs.name: Missing DESIGN.md content accepted
bugs.invariant: A design request without string content must fail before compilation or network access.

bugs.name: Source overwrite check occurred too late
bugs.invariant: CLI compilation must reject input/output aliasing before reading DESIGN.md or writing any artifact.

bugs.name: Artifact integrity checker blind spots
bugs.invariant: Manifest identities, canonical references, DOM provenance, source hashes, and emitted node inventories must fail closed on drift.

bugs.name: Published schema and runtime validator drift
bugs.invariant: The published JSON schemas and runtime validators must reject each other's invalid conformance corpus in both directions.

bugs.name: Non-strict JSON ingestion
bugs.invariant: Intent JSON must reject duplicate keys for arbitrary key names and values instead of silently applying last-write-wins.

bugs.name: Unsafe CSS and autofetch values
bugs.invariant: Emitter style values capable of fetching, escaping, or injecting active content must be rejected before any artifact write.

bugs.name: URL and beacon policy bypasses
bugs.invariant: Every browser-equivalent HTTP authority using slash, backslash, percent-backslash, or control whitespace must be classified as remote.

bugs.name: Exactly-once provenance duplication
bugs.invariant: Every generated built-in motif must route each content address exactly once and emit globally unique IR identifiers.

bugs.name: Silent content loss in motif planning
bugs.invariant: A declared member that cannot enter its motif wrapper must remain rendered as a leftover with a diagnostic, never disappear.

bugs.name: Protobuf map-dependent outline ordering
bugs.invariant: Outline output order must remain canonical under every insertion permutation of protobuf map-backed slots.

bugs.name: Unbounded recursive input
bugs.invariant: Region and outline nesting beyond the declared depth bound must return diagnostics instead of raising RecursionError.

bugs.name: Python and generated reducer divergence
bugs.invariant: Generated operations over bounded arbitrary records must return the same state or the same failure class as the Python interpreter.

bugs.name: Reducer partial mutation on failure
bugs.invariant: A reducer operation list that fails after a valid first operation must return no partial state in either runtime.

bugs.name: State validation, topology, and action-id corruption
bugs.invariant: State selectors, topology comparison, and emitted action identifiers must be validated structurally and remain order independent.

bugs.name: CLI user errors misclassified as internal failures
bugs.invariant: Missing or unreadable user inputs must return public exit code 2 and structured user-error output.

bugs.name: Missing Node.js misdiagnosed
bugs.invariant: Node absence must produce its exact actionable code and doctor result rather than masquerading as reducer nonconformance.

bugs.name: Insufficient generated color contrast
bugs.invariant: Every supported aesthetic profile and base recipe must meet the scoped WCAG AA contrast floor and fail closed when colors are unknown.

bugs.name: Accessibility name checks were vacuous
bugs.invariant: Interactive controls must receive a real accessible name through explicit or unambiguous structural association, and unknown cases fail closed.

guards.anchor: has unnamed controls

bugs.name: Source distribution repository bloat
bugs.invariant: A release must contain exactly one wheel and one sdist, each below 4 MiB compressed and free of repository, cache, dependency, and traversal paths.

bugs.name: Broken pricing, provenance, and conversion paths
bugs.invariant: Commercial facts must stay synchronized and the public pricing and provenance surfaces must remain browser-usable at desktop and mobile widths.

guards.anchor: provenance inspector locks a verified semantic chain
pricing conversion links match the public commercial contract
Validated public pricing, checkout, and current hosted capabilities.

bugs.name: Stacked PR delivery stranded generated UI
bugs.invariant: All public demo outputs must match their current builders and remain reachable through the real-browser regression corpus.

guards.anchor: public demos are runtime-clean and viewport-bounded

bugs.name: Local and hosted canonical parser drift
bugs.invariant: All public parsing surfaces must accept and reject schema_version according to the same JSON-integer semantics.
